overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit downtown intersection. The player waits for a vehicle to pass, then crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk and continues along a wet sidewalk beneath elevated highways, surrounded by towering glass buildings and vibrant holographic advertisements.

events.description: black SUV drives across the crosswalk from left to right
begins walking forward across the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: waits at the crosswalk for the vehicle to pass, then begins walking across the yellow-striped intersection

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving across the crosswalk from left to right

illuminated commercial sign with letter C logo and text

cylindrical metallic structure with glowing pink neon base ring
tall modern skyscrapers with illuminated windows and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a neon-lit urban intersection at night, positioned at a broad yellow crosswalk. A black SUV passes from left to right before the camera begins moving forward across the street. The California Express sign glows red on the right, while a distinctive pink-lit cylindrical pillar stands in the distance center frame, beneath an elevated highway structure.

events.description: pedestrians cross from the opposite direction, passing in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the intersection toward the center island with the pink neon pillar

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward camera across the crosswalk

segments.scene_description: Continuing across the wide intersection, the camera approaches the central pink neon pillar. Pedestrians appear walking from the opposite direction, crossing paths with the player. The surrounding glass towers loom closer, and the wet asphalt reflects the vibrant neon lights from the overhead structure and distant signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet sidewalk beneath elevated highway with neon storefronts

events.description: steps onto the sidewalk from the crosswalk, passing the pink neon pillar

agents.ego_description: turning slightly left onto the sidewalk and passing the pink neon pillar structure on the left

entered.detail: reflective pavement surface showing pink and cyan neon reflections
shopfront with distinctive green zigzag neon tubing and metal grating
black and yellow striped posts lining the curb edge

segments.scene_description: The player steps off the crosswalk onto a wet concrete sidewalk, passing the glowing pink pillar on the left. The ground reflects the vibrant neon lights from the storefronts and overhead highway. A shop with green zigzag neon signage becomes visible on the left as the camera continues forward along the curb lined with black bollards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with escalator entrance and digital billboards

agents.ego_description: continuing down the covered sidewalk past an escalator entrance with yellow neon trim, with sparse pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk near the escalator

entered.detail: stairway entrance structure with yellow and pink neon edging and glass sides
large illuminated billboards displaying colorful advertisements on the building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the elevated highway overpass, the scene becomes more enclosed. An escalator entrance with bright yellow neon trim appears on the left, while large digital advertising screens illuminate the right side of the walkway. The wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding neon lights as the camera moves deeper into the covered urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, neon-lit urban intersection into a more enclosed, subterranean-feeling corridor beneath an elevated highway. It begins at a broad yellow crosswalk, waiting for a black SUV to pass before moving forward past a glowing red California Express sign toward a distant pink cylindrical pillar. As the camera crosses the wet asphalt, the scene opens up to reveal towering glass buildings and oncoming pedestrians, with the ground reflecting the vibrant overhead lights. The movement then shifts onto a wet concrete sidewalk, passing the pink pillar and a shop with green zigzag neon signage while following a curb lined with black bollards. Finally, the environment becomes more constricted as the camera moves beneath the highway overpass, passing a yellow-trimmed escalator entrance and large digital advertising screens that illuminate the covered walkway.
